nodes.norm_label: base error for every explicit codex provider failure.

nodes.norm_label: raised when analysis input cannot be represented safely.

nodes.norm_label: raised when the configured codex executable is unavailable.

nodes.norm_label: raised when the codex child process cannot be started or fed.

nodes.norm_label: raised when a codex invocation exceeds its deadline.

nodes.norm_label: raised when a child-process stream exceeds its configured bound.

nodes.norm_label: raised when jsonl progress output violates the documented protocol.

nodes.norm_label: raised when the final response is missing, malformed, or ungrounded.

nodes.norm_label: runtime validation model matching the schema supplied to codex.

nodes.norm_label: execute a role analysis and return a validated json-compatible dictionary.
